features: Package Contents: You will receive 12 pieces of wig clips, each clip comes with a safety pin for easy fixing of your wig or headscarf. Sufficient quantity to meet your needs.
Premium Material: Our chunni grip clip is made of stainless steel metal, not easy to break and deform. Comes with a silicone stick to protect your hair and scalp, which can be used for a long time.

Special Design: The hair extension clip adds the function of a safety pin, which can firmly fix your wig or headwear in place, and the clip is hidden and will not affect the wearing effect of the overall headgear, making you more fashionable and beautiful.
Convenient and Practical: These wig clips are lightweight and easy to store and carry, you can wear it anytime and anywhere according to your needs.

Wide Application: Our dupatta clips are suitable for wigs, weaves and more, helping you complete your DIY hair extensions. With this Chunni clip, it will be easy to set and fit wigs, extensions and hair accessories, an ideal accessory for weddings and other important events.
description: Product description Specification: Color: black, white, gold, silver Main Material: stainless steel metal Product Size: 3.6x1.8cm/1.42x0.71 inch Package details: 12 x wig clips Note: Due to manual measurement, the size and weight may have a certain error. Due to the difference between monitors, there may be a slight color difference. Directions Open the clip by pressing the lever, position it in the desired location on the hair, release the lever to close the clip and secure it in place.
